title: sideritis incana var. guyoniana
intro: Sideritis incana var. guyoniana, also known as White Sideritis, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant is native to the Mediterranean region and is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of White Sideritis include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and supporting respiratory health. White Sideritis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
